name: Boss threatening to fire me after forklift accident, is that legal?
description: Illegal retaliation—report to labor dept, document everything, lawyer up.

mainEntity.name: Boss threatening to fire me after forklift accident, is that legal?

acceptedAnswer.text: Illegal retaliation—report to labor dept, document everything, lawyer up.
acceptedAnswer.description: **No, retaliation violates workers' comp laws in UT/ID; protected to file claims.** Report to labor board.[6] Key factors: Document threats; file unemployment if terminated. Sue for wrongful discharge if proven. Lawyer protects job/benefits.
